hero.title: Culinary arts in service of African excellence
hero.subtitle: Train for careers in hospitality and gastronomy in Brazzaville, with internationally recognized world-class education.

why.title: Why choose EGJP?
why.subtitle: Excellence-driven training rooted in African reality, open to the world.
why.card1_desc: 15 years of culinary training, with chefs from the finest French and African establishments.
why.card2_desc: 95% of our graduates find employment within 6 months — hotels, restaurants, catering, entrepreneurship.
why.card3_desc: Mastery of classical French techniques alongside authentic African flavors and local products.
why.card4_desc: La Petite Faim, our training restaurant open to the public, immerses you in real-world service conditions.

home.cta_subtitle: Join the next EGJP cohort and build your future in gastronomy.
